title: Workload / Resourcing - Able to pull in by workspace vs. board
excerpt: My ask would allow the workload widget or any resource tool to pull in a selected person within any workspace vs handpicking boards from a list. Even as an admin I don’t have access to see every board so I don’t have the…

posts.author: Jtattan (Jillian Tattan )
posts.cookedHtml: My ask would allow the workload widget or any resource tool to pull in a selected person within any workspace vs handpicking boards from a list. Even as an admin I don’t have access to see every board so I don’t have the option to select a board if I can’t see it. As a PM, I should be able to pull in assigned tasks to my teams for resourcing even if I can’t have access to the board. I don’t necessarily care about having permissions for this case but I need to extract the information for resourcing.
